meta.notes: Warm run — fresh session with whisper model pre-cached in environment. No pre-install time counted. Agent used nohup+poll pattern as instructed. ffmpeg stderr redirected to file. Clean execution, no timeouts or crashes.

test_input.name: charli-daily-vlog.mp4
test_input.description: TikTok-style short vlog, English speech, vertical format

task.name: video-captions
task.purpose: Add TikTok-style captions to 67.8s English vlog video
task.expected_output: Captioned mp4 with tiktok-style word highlights

install.notes: Skills pre-loaded into container. Whisper model pre-cached in environment. No install time counted (fair comparison with other platforms).

asset_acquisition.notes: Downloaded 4.7MB in ~1.4s actual transfer. Tool overhead includes env setup. Agent also read SKILL.md (3.6s) before download.

steps.name: read_skill_md
steps.notes: Agent read SKILL.md to understand workflow

steps.name: nohup_background_start
steps.notes: Started caption script in background via nohup

steps.name: poll_completion
steps.notes: Polled with sleep 10 loop. Actual caption script completed in 23.2s (reported 23195ms). Transcribed 139 words, English auto-detected.

execution.notes: Full pipeline (extract audio + whisper transcribe + ASS generate + ffmpeg burn) completed in 23.2s. ffmpeg stderr redirected to file — no context bloat.

delivery.notes: CDN upload via nova3_common.cdn.upload_to_cdn in 2.9s actual. LLM overhead includes analyzing caption output + composing final summary.
